name: obsidian-style-manager
description: Style Manager is an Obsidian plugin that provides advanced controls for managing themes, CSS snippets, and style settings. It transforms CSS snippets and theme settings into adjustable controls, enabling you to save, export or switch between entire aesthetic configurations as presets instantly.

scripts.build: node scripts/readme-view-content.mjs && tsc -noEmit -skipLibCheck && node esbuild.config.mjs production
scripts.clean: npm run prettier && npm run lint:fix
scripts.health: npm run lint && npm run typecheck
scripts.release:patch: npm version patch && npm run bump && npm run release
scripts.release:minor: npm version minor && npm run bump && npm run release
scripts.release:major: npm version major && npm run bump && npm run release

author: emarpiee
